div.p: Invariants 1 + 2 + 3 ⟹ Invariant 4 If at most one leader per term (1), leaders have all committed entries (2), and logs converge via matching (3), then all nodes apply the same commands in the same order (4).

ul.li: Must hold at ALL times Liveness = "something good eventually happens"

p.strong: At most one leader per term
New leader has all committed entries
